movie.actors: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jim Belushi, Peter Boyle, Ed O'Ross
movie.plot: Arnold Schwarzenegger plays a Russian policeman sent after a Georgian drug dealer who has escaped to the United States and is awaiting extradition in Chicago. Jim Belushi plays his temporary partner on the Chicago police. When the drug dealer escapes, the two police must overcome their differences in order to recapture him.
movie.title: Red Heat
movie.writer: Walter Hill (story), Harry Kleiner (screenplay), Walter Hill (screenplay), Troy Kennedy-Martin (screenplay)
